extortion.description: [AI generated] Sylvania is a leading designer and manufacturer of lighting systems and specialty products with operations and sales worldwide. It offers a wide range of products including, incandescent, fluorescent, and HID lamps, as well as LEDs. The company was originally established in 1901 as the Novelty Incandescent Lamp Company. The American brand is now owned by the Austrian company LEDVANCE, part of the Chinese lighting company MLS Co. LTD.
